subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from the presence of One mighty and powerful, and verily it proclaimeth at all times that there is no God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من لدن عزیز قدیرا و انه ینطق بالحق فیکل حین بانه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
